'''âm-m-sh''' ('''mamasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lollipop|lollipop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-m-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lollipop|lollipop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-m-sh
|-
! Lemma
| mamasha
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mamashithi|mamashithi]] || [[word:mamashiji|mamashiji]] || [[word:mamashishi|mamashishi]] || [[word:mamashi|mamashi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mamashuthuth|mamashuthuth]] || [[word:mamashujuj|mamashujuj]] || [[word:mamashushush|mamashushush]] || [[word:mamash|mamash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mamashuthu|mamashuthu]] || [[word:mamashuju|mamashuju]] || [[word:mamashushu|mamashushu]] || [[word:mamashu|mamashu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mamashufuth|mamashufuth]] || [[word:mamashufuj|mamashufuj]] || [[word:mamashufush|mamashufush]] || [[word:mamashuf|mamashuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mamashethe|mamashethe]] || [[word:mamasheje|mamasheje]] || [[word:mamasheshe|mamasheshe]] || [[word:mamashe|mamashe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mamashothoth|mamashothoth]] || [[word:mamashojoj|mamashojoj]] || [[word:mamashoshosh|mamashoshosh]] || [[word:mamash|mamash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mamashotho|mamashotho]] || [[word:mamashojo|mamashojo]] || [[word:mamashosho|mamashosho]] || [[word:mamasho|mamasho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mamashofoth|mamashofoth]] || [[word:mamashofoj|mamashofoj]] || [[word:mamashofosh|mamashofosh]] || [[word:mamashof|mamashof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mamashĂŻf|mamashĂŻf]] || [[word:mamashĂŻf|mamashĂŻf]] || [[word:mamashĂŻf|mamashĂŻf]] || [[word:mamashĂŻf|mamashĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mamashĂŻfĂŻf|mamashĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:mamashĂŻfĂŻf|mamashĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:mamashĂŻfĂŻf|mamashĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:mamashĂŻfĂŻf|mamashĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mamashĂŻf|mamashĂŻf]] || [[word:mamashĂŻf|mamashĂŻf]] || [[word:mamashĂŻf|mamashĂŻf]] || [[word:mamashĂŻf|mamashĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mamashĂŻf|mamashĂŻf]] || [[word:mamashĂŻf|mamashĂŻf]] || [[word:mamashĂŻf|mamashĂŻf]] || [[word:mamashĂŻf|mamashĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mamashĂŠthĂŠ|mamashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:mamashĂŠjĂŠ|mamashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:mamashĂŠshĂŠ|mamashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:mamashĂŠ|mamashĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mamashathath|mamashathath]] || [[word:mamashajaj|mamashajaj]] || [[word:mamashashash|mamashashash]] || [[word:mamash|mamash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mamashatha|mamashatha]] || [[word:mamashaja|mamashaja]] || [[word:mamashasha|mamashasha]] || [[word:mamasha|mamasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mamashafath|mamashafath]] || [[word:mamashafaj|mamashafaj]] || [[word:mamashafash|mamashafash]] || [[word:mamashaf|mamashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:mamashasha|mamashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomamashasha|gomamashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimamashasha|gokimamashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:mamashnĂŒasha|mamashnĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomamashnknĂŒasha|gomamashnknĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimamashnĂŒasha|gokimamashnĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mamashshĂ«asha|mamashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomamashnkshĂ«asha|gomamashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimamashshĂ«asha|gokimamashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mamashroasha|mamashroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomamashnkroasha|gomamashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimamashroasha|gokimamashroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mamashmuasha|mamashmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomamashnkmuasha|gomamashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimamashmuasha|gokimamashmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:mamashsherasha|mamashsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomamashnksherasha|gomamashnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimamashsherasha|gokimamashsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:mamashngasha|mamashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomamashnkngasha|gomamashnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimamashngasha|gokimamashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mamashyaasha|mamashyaasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomamashnkyaasha|gomamashnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimamashyaasha|gokimamashyaasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:mamashyamasha|mamashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomamashnkyamasha|gomamashnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimamashyamasha|gokimamashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:mamashnĂŒshĂ«asha|mamashnĂŒshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomamashnknĂŒshĂ«asha|gomamashnknĂŒshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimamashnĂŒshĂ«asha|gokimamashnĂŒshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mamashnĂŒroasha|mamashnĂŒroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomamashnknĂŒroasha|gomamashnknĂŒroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimamashnĂŒroasha|gokimamashnĂŒroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mamashnĂŒmuasha|mamashnĂŒmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomamashnknĂŒmuasha|gomamashnknĂŒmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimamashnĂŒmuasha|gokimamashnĂŒmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:mamashshĂ«nĂŒasha|mamashshĂ«nĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomamashnkshĂ«nĂŒasha|gomamashnkshĂ«nĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimamashshĂ«nĂŒasha|gokimamashshĂ«nĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mamashshĂ«roasha|mamashshĂ«roasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomamashnkshĂ«roasha|gomamashnkshĂ«roasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimamashshĂ«roasha|gokimamashshĂ«roasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mamashshĂ«muasha|mamashshĂ«muasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomamashnkshĂ«muasha|gomamashnkshĂ«muasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimamashshĂ«muasha|gokimamashshĂ«muasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:mamashronĂŒasha|mamashronĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomamashnkronĂŒasha|gomamashnkronĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimamashronĂŒasha|gokimamashronĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:mamashroshĂ«asha|mamashroshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomamashnkroshĂ«asha|gomamashnkroshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimamashroshĂ«asha|gokimamashroshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mamashromuasha|mamashromuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomamashnkromuasha|gomamashnkromuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimamashromuasha|gokimamashromuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:mamashmunĂŒasha|mamashmunĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomamashnkmunĂŒasha|gomamashnkmunĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimamashmunĂŒasha|gokimamashmunĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:mamashmushĂ«asha|mamashmushĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomamashnkmushĂ«asha|gomamashnkmushĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimamashmushĂ«asha|gokimamashmushĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mamashmuroasha|mamashmuroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomamashnkmuroasha|gomamashnkmuroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimamashmuroasha|gokimamashmuroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:mamash|mamash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:mĂŠmĂŠsh|mĂŠmĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homamash|homamash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:homĂŠmĂŠsh|homĂŠmĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomamash|hohomamash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomĂŠmĂŠsh|hohomĂŠmĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒmamash|nĂŒmamash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒmĂŠmĂŠsh|nĂŒmĂŠmĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmamash|nĂŒnĂŒmamash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠmĂŠsh|nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠmĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻmamash|nĂŻmamash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻmĂŠmĂŠsh|nĂŻmĂŠmĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmamash|nĂŻnĂŻmamash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠmĂŠsh|nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠmĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumamash|lumamash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lumĂŠmĂŠsh|lumĂŠmĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumamash|lulumamash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumĂŠmĂŠsh|lulumĂŠmĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limamash|limamash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:limĂŠmĂŠsh|limĂŠmĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimamash|lilimamash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimĂŠmĂŠsh|lilimĂŠmĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komamash|komamash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:komĂŠmĂŠsh|komĂŠmĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomamash|kokomamash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomĂŠmĂŠsh|kokomĂŠmĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemamash|kemamash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kemĂŠmĂŠsh|kemĂŠmĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemamash|kekemamash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemĂŠmĂŠsh|kekemĂŠmĂŠsh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
